name: ocas-weave
description: Weave: private provenance-backed social graph. Maintains queryable records of people, relationships, preferences, and shared experiences for recall, gifting, hosting, introductions, and serendipity. Trigger phrases: 'who do I know in', 'what does X like', 'add this person', 'relationship with', 'gift ideas for', 'sync contacts', 'prepare for meeting with', 'update weave'. Use when storing or retrieving facts about a person, recording a relationship, or discovering connections between people.
author: Indigo Karasu

credentials.name: google_contacts_oauth
credentials.description: Google People API v1 OAuth credentials for contact sync

credentials.name: clay_api_key
credentials.description: Clay REST API Bearer token for CRM sync

platform_dependencies_note: Python examples in references/ are illustrative. Dependencies (real_ladybug, googleapiclient, requests) are provided by the OpenClaw platform runtime.
